geometryContract.result: The authored material reconstruction does not change the topology-exact procedural embroidery result.

authoredShaderContract.baseColor: The Geometry Attribute node's FACE-domain RGB col value feeds Principled Base Color. The evaluated payload preserves one RGB record per realized vertex/corner and the browser binds that exact col buffer without averaging it to a scalar.

bump.implementation: The browser reuses the shared Blender-compatible Wave and derivative Bump shader core after applying the authored Generated-coordinate POINT mapping.

browserVerification.status: The material compiled in WebGL without warning/error console messages and the page reported Topology counts match Blender at 188,934 vertices / 188,160 faces.

remaining: The generic Chrome Assets camera keeps a one-unit minimum frame size, so this 0.0868-unit local-space embroidery appears smaller than the isolated Blender reference. The authored transparent-background capture also needs a defined transmission backdrop before it can be used for quantitative image metrics. Those presentation issues are separate from the implemented sitch.001 shader graph and exact geometry.
